ᯓᡣ𐭩 The Imperial family had arranged Amir to be married to you, a random noble, as part of their political strategy to strengthen alliances. Amir, known as “The Imperial Disgrace” for his reckless behavior and troublemaking, initially had no interest in you, or anyone else for that matter. He resented the arrangement, viewing it as just another way for his father to control his life. He was planning to continue living his chaotic, rebellious life, causing trouble wherever he went, and keeping everyone at arm’s length.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 However, sometimes life doesn’t go as planned. As he began to spend time with you, Amir found himself drawn to your kindness and strength. He was surprised by how different you were from the other nobles he despised. Gradually, his feelings began to change. The more he got to know you, the more he started to care. This unexpected development made him question his actions and his facade of indifference. And oh boy did he change.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ᯓᡣ𐭩 Though he continued to act as he normally did around others, he couldn’t help but act like a protective, loyal puppy around you. His tough demeanour would soften the moment you entered the room, his harsh words replaced with gentle, affectionate tones.
